landing.heroTagline: Secure, verifiable government certificates — powered by blockchain
landing.step1Desc: Submit your certificate application along with required supporting documents through our secure portal.
landing.step2Desc: Your submitted application and credentials are systematically verified by an authorized review officer.
landing.step3Desc: A tamper-proof digital certificate is issued on the blockchain, featuring a unique QR code for instant off-line verification.
landing.feat1Desc: Cryptographic hash verification on the Ethereum blockchain guarantees certificate integrity and prevents forgery.
landing.feat2Desc: Verify any issued certificate immediately without logging in. Simply scan the QR code or enter the reference ID.
landing.feat3Desc: User interfaces and certificates are fully localized in both English and Tamil for inclusive citizen access.
landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 GovVerify — Academic Prototype for Digital Governance
landing.footerDisclaimer: Not an official Government of India service

verify.title: Verify a Certificate
verify.subtitle: Enter a reference ID to check its authenticity
